name: get_latest_checks
title: Get Latest SEO, Security & Speed Checks
description: Returns the most recent SEO, security, and page speed check results for a site. Includes pass/fail/warning breakdowns and the specific issues found in each area.

site_id.description: The numeric ID of the site, obtained from list_sites.

area.description: Which check area to retrieve. Use "all" only when multiple areas are needed simultaneously, as it returns a larger payload.
